message:
feat(robot): use project-scoped alert config throughout robot mode

Replace all calls to alerts.DefaultConfig() with alertConfigForProject()
in buildProjectionBackedStatus, buildLiveStatus, GetAlertsDetailed,
GetDashboard, and GetAlertsTUI so that per-project alert overrides
(including the new context_warning_threshold and alerts.enabled=false)
are respected everywhere. Update ToConfigAlerts to accept the new
contextWarningThreshold parameter and wire it through the TUI dashboard.

The previous code silently ignored project config, meaning a project
with alerts.enabled=false would still see alerts in status, dashboard,
and detailed views.

Tests: robot_test adds three new cases verifying that disabled alert
config suppresses alerts in GetStatusWithOptions, GetDashboard, and
GetAlertsDetailed. tui_parity_test adds GetAlertsTUIRespectsDisabled.
markdown_test and alerts_test updated for new threshold field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3044,17 +3044,9 @@ func GetAlertsTUI(cfg *config.Config, opts TUIAlertsOptions) (*TUIAlertsOutput,
 		Alerts:        []TUIAlertInfo{},
 	}
 
-	// Get alerts from the alerts package
-	alertCfg := alerts.DefaultConfig()
-	if cfg != nil && cfg.Alerts.Enabled {
-		alertCfg = alerts.Config{
-			Enabled:              cfg.Alerts.Enabled,
-			AgentStuckMinutes:    cfg.Alerts.AgentStuckMinutes,
-			DiskLowThresholdGB:   cfg.Alerts.DiskLowThresholdGB,
-			MailBacklogThreshold: cfg.Alerts.MailBacklogThreshold,
-			BeadStaleHours:       cfg.Alerts.BeadStaleHours,
-		}
-	}
+	// Use the same project-aware alert config path as the rest of robot mode so
+	// disabled/custom alert settings remain authoritative here too.
+	alertCfg := alertConfigForProject(cfg, "")
 	alertList := alerts.GetActiveAlerts(alertCfg)
 
 	now := time.Now()

@@ -136,6 +136,7 @@ func (m *Model) fetchAlertsCmd() tea.Cmd {
 				cfg.Alerts.DiskLowThresholdGB,
 				cfg.Alerts.MailBacklogThreshold,
 				cfg.Alerts.BeadStaleHours,
+				cfg.Alerts.ContextWarningThreshold,
 				cfg.Alerts.ResolvedPruneMinutes,
 				projectDir,
 			)
